# Mulsetu

> Mulsetu is a global technology and AI company that works as a dedicated IT team for businesses and founders worldwide. We build software, automate operations, and manage technology end-to-end — so you don't have to build an in-house IT department.

Mulsetu (legally incorporated as Mulsetu Agrotech Private Limited) is a technology services company serving clients across 30+ countries. We operate as an embedded technology partner — functioning like an in-house IT team — rather than a traditional vendor or agency.

## What Mulsetu Does

- **SaaS Platform Development**: Multi-tenant, multi-role SaaS products with subscription billing, analytics, and scalable infrastructure
- **Custom Software & ERP**: Bespoke business systems — ERP, CRM, inventory management, billing, HR, and workflow automation
- **AI & Automation**: AI chatbots, intelligent agents, email automation, document processing, and workflow orchestration
- **Website Development**: Performance-first websites and web applications in Next.js, React, and WordPress
- **Mobile App Development**: Android, iOS, and cross-platform Flutter apps
- **Digital Growth & SEO**: SEO strategy, performance optimisation, analytics, and lead generation
- **Data Scraping & Research**: Ethical web scraping, competitive intelligence, and automated data pipelines
- **Dedicated IT Team Model**: Full technology team (developers, designers, AI engineers, DevOps, SEO) on a retainer model — one team, one contact, full accountability

## Who Mulsetu Serves

- Founders and startups building their first digital product or SaaS platform
- SMEs digitising their operations and moving away from manual processes
- Companies that need ongoing technology support without the cost of a full in-house team
- International businesses expanding into new markets who need technology built to scale
- Enterprises needing AI automation to reduce operational overhead

Mulsetu serves clients globally — including the United States, United Kingdom, Canada, Australia, UAE, India, and Europe — with no geographic restrictions on engagement.

## Notable Work

- **TrackMyStartup**: A multi-role SaaS platform for the startup ecosystem, featuring 7 distinct dashboards (Startup, Investor, Investment Advisor, Incubation Center, CA, CS, Mentors). Now live in 30+ countries.

## Engagement Model

Mulsetu works as a long-term technology partner, not a one-time project vendor. The dedicated IT team model means clients get a senior developer, UI/UX designer, AI engineer, SEO specialist, and DevOps support — without hiring individually.
